e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML compiled class images can now dispatch a named method by index against a record-backed self value. Missing method dispatch returns an explicit BML-HATI-UNSUPPORTED method/not-found receipt instead of silently selecting method zero.
public_endpoints: not-public-endpoint: local Form/BML/Hati compiler proof surface
test_flows: Parse Read, Alt, and Set method bodies through existing BML executable method source rules.
Construct a class image with three methods and record-backed value field.
Dispatch Read and Alt by name against the same record-backed self and receive distinct values.
Dispatch Set by name, mutating record-backed self.value to 33.
Dispatch a missing method and receive BML-HATI-UNSUPPORTED method/not-found.
